subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from the presence of Bahá unto him whom God hath shielded in these days [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدی البهآء الی الذی عصمه الله فی تلک الأیام
subcodes.subjects: @rebellion and misdeeds of Mirza Yahya; the Azalis, @suffering and imprisonment, @spiritual transformation, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
